title: CSIR NEERI Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Project Associate Posts
description: The National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Project Associate Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Civil Engineering and M.Sc. can apply for the CSIR NEERI Jobs 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education ...
